title: Help & support
subtitle: Guides, keyboard shortcuts, and internal contacts for CMS staff

docs.title: Help center
docs.intro: Staff guides with do's, don'ts, and step-by-step scenarios. Open a topic to read the full guide — not the live console screen.

gettingStarted.title: Getting started
gettingStarted.description: Sign-in, profile, password, MFA, locale, and theme preferences.
gettingStarted.cardHint: Sign-in, MFA, session timeout, and access errors.

complaints.title: Complaints & workflow
complaints.description: Queue, case detail, status transitions, notes, tasks, and attachments.
complaints.cardHint: Triage, transitions, notes, assignments, and workflow errors.

escalation.title: Escalating complaints
escalation.description: When to escalate, how to use Escalate, and what to write in reasons and notes.
escalation.cardHint: Escalate vs Transition, SLA risk, and good escalation notes.

sla.title: SLA rules & deadlines
sla.description: Warnings, breaches, escalation, and when to act.
sla.cardHint: SLA warnings, breaches, and escalation decisions.

recovery.title: Recovery inquiries
recovery.description: Lost reference numbers and citizen recovery requests.
recovery.cardHint: When to resolve vs reject a lost-reference inquiry.

reports.title: Reports & analytics
reports.description: Volume, SLA, resolution, channels, and exports.
reports.cardHint: Which report to use and safe export practices.

notifications.title: In-app notifications
notifications.description: Bell inbox for assignments, SLA alerts, and account events.
notifications.cardHint: Bell inbox types and how they differ from email admin.

admin.title: Administration
admin.description: Users, roles, reference data, templates, and audit log.
admin.cardHint: Users, roles, reference data, templates, and audit.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: Press a shortcut key anywhere in the staff console, or click a row below to try it.

support.title: Staff support
support.intro: Internal contacts for CMS staff. For citizen inquiries, use the public website — not these channels.

ict.title: MoPD ICT service desk
ict.when: Password reset, MFA device issues, account lock, VPN, or browser problems.

cms.title: CMS application support
cms.when: Software defects, missing permissions, workflow errors, or failed exports.

program.title: Program office
program.when: Business rules, triage procedures, categories, and org structure.
